qa_pair.question: Resolve DOI "10.1038/nature14539" to its Semantic Scholar paperId (CorpusId).
How many authors are listed on "Attention Is All You Need" (2017)?
What year was "Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition" published?
What is Yoshua Bengio's Semantic Scholar authorId?
Publication year of "ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks"?
What format are Semantic Scholar dataset release IDs?
Venue of "Generative Adversarial Nets" (Goodfellow et al., 2014)?
